2025-26 Detroit Pistons Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 60-22, Finished 1st in NBA Eastern Conference

Coach: J.B. Bickerstaff (60-22)

Executive: Trajan Langdon

PTS/G: 117.8 (8th of 30) Opp PTS/G: 109.6 (3rd of 30)

SRS: 7.53 (3rd of 30) Pace: 99.3 (17th of 30)

Off Rtg: 117.9 (10th of 30) Def Rtg: 109.7 (2nd of 30) Net Rtg: +8.2 (3rd of 30)

Expected W-L: 60-22 (3rd of 30)

Preseason Odds: Championship +3300, Over-Under 46.5

Arena: Little Caesars Arena Attendance: 806,422 (4th of 30)

NBA 2026 Playoffs:
Won NBA Eastern Conference First Round (4-3) versus Orlando Magic  (Series Stats)
Lost NBA Eastern Conference Semifinals (3-4) versus Cleveland Cavaliers  (Series Stats)

Value Over Replacement Player

Value over Replacement Player
A box score estimate of the points per 100 TEAM possessions that a player contributed above a replacement-level (-2.0) player, translated to an average team and prorated to an 82-game season.

Multiply by 2.70 to convert to wins over replacement.

Cade Cunningham 4.6 (8th)
Jalen Duren 3.5 (17th)

Offensive Rating

Offensive Rating
An estimate of points produced (players) or scored (teams) per 100 possessions

Jalen Duren 134.1 (5th)
Duncan Robinson 128.7 (14th)

Defensive Rating

Defensive Rating
An estimate of points allowed per 100 possessions

Ausar Thompson 105.5 (3rd)
Jalen Duren 107.9 (5th)
Ron Holland 108.2 (6th)
Cade Cunningham 110.1 (12th)
Tobias Harris 111.2 (18th)

Usage Pct

Usage Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of team plays used by a player while they were on the floor.

Cade Cunningham 30.5 (10th)

Total Rebound Pct

Total Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Jalen Duren 20.9 (5th)

Offensive Rebound Pct

Offensive Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available offensive rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Jalen Duren 15.3 (3rd)
Ausar Thompson 9.0 (16th)

Assist Pct

Assist Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of teammate field goals a player assisted while they were on the floor.

Cade Cunningham 45.2 (2nd)

Defensive Rebound Pct

Defensive Rebound Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of available defensive rebounds a player grabbed while they were on the floor.

Jalen Duren 26.4 (7th)

Steal Pct

Steal Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent possessions that end with a steal by the player while they were on the floor.

Ausar Thompson 3.7 (1st)
Ron Holland 2.9 (7th)

Block Pct

Block Percentage
An estimate of the percentage of opponent two-point field goal attempts blocked by the player while they were on the floor.

Ausar Thompson 3.6 (15th)

Turnover Pct

Turnover Percentage
An estimate of turnovers committed per 100 plays.

Duncan Robinson 6.7 (5th)
Tobias Harris 8.0 (12th)

Triple-Doubles

Triple-Doubles The NBA did not track Triple-Doubles until 1979-80 when Magic Johnson popularized the feat. Nonetheless, we can present Triple-Doubles since 1950-51 when rebounds became an official statistic. A small number may yet be unaccounted for but we're confident in the completeness of the list.

Cade Cunningham 3 (8th)
